Gaviom Impact

Two causes. Split down the middle.

Five percent,
every month.

We set aside 5% of Gaviom's net profit after each draw cycle, half to children's hospitals, half to ocean conservation. Not a campaign. A line item.

CMN Hospitals · Ocean Conservancy
$0Total donated to date
0Beneficiaries supported
5%Of net profit · every month
2501(c)(3) partners · 2.5% each

Numbers go live after our first monthly close. We post them here, not in a press release.

Where it goes

Our two partners

2.5% of Gaviom net profit

Children's Miracle Network Hospitals

170 hospitals · US & Canada

CMN Hospitals raises money for local pediatric programs, equipment, research, and care for kids who can't wait. Dollars stay in the community where they're raised. Over $9B in support to date across the network.

Learn more →

2.5% of Gaviom net profit

Ocean Conservancy

501(c)(3) · Tax-deductible giving

Ocean Conservancy connects science, policy, and volunteers to protect marine life and coastlines, from plastic pollution to climate-ready fisheries. The ocean produces half the oxygen we breathe. We're not neutral on that.

Learn more →

The mechanics

How the 5%
actually moves.

Monthly close. One calculation. Two wire transfers. Logged on this page within a week.

01 · TICKETS

You buy tickets.

Entries fund the prize pool and Gaviom's operations, same checkout, same published odds.

02 · CLOSE

We close the month.

At month-end we tally net profit across all completed draws and calculate 5% of that figure.

03 · DONATE

We split it 50/50.

Half to CMN Hospitals, half to Ocean Conservancy. Amounts published in the log below, no rounding games.

Public record

Donation log

Every transfer we make shows up here. Empty rows mean we haven't closed that month yet.

Month Draw(s) Net profit 5% donated CMN Hospitals Ocean Conservancy Status
July 2025 Draw #1 First draw pending

Updated within 7 days of each monthly donation.
